data.title: ProVendorConnect launches B2B marketplace for property managers
data.description: The platform allows property managers and HOA boards to post tenders, define scope and review bids.

data.title: Sysco-Restaurant Depot deal signals a shift to hybrid B2B ecommerce
data.description: Executives said the deal will create “a nationwide omnichannel food service provider,” expanding how customers buy based on price, speed, and service preferences.

data.title: AI pushes B2B ecommerce toward fewer platforms as budgets shift
data.description: For B2B sellers, the report points to a more disciplined approach to ecommerce investment, with a focus on consolidation, integration, and data utilization.

data.title: Würth expands e-procurement integration to streamline B2B purchasing
data.description: The company said automation is saving an average of seven minutes per order, or about 490,000 minutes annually — 8,167 hours.

data.title: GigaCloud partners with Otto Group to expand European marketplace assortment
data.description: The partnership reflects broader marketplace-driven expansion strategies in B2B ecommerce, particularly in categories that require complex fulfillment.
